title: Materiality
description: Ores, electronics, plants, decorations and tools.
body:
NOTE: Due to the limitations of MCreator, to place a block on any log of this mod you will need to crouch.
inspired by [minecraftcontentexpansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraftcontentexpansion) and [Biomes o'plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
Materiality have
### ores:
Tin
Ruby,
Zink,
Topaz

### Plants:
Rose(blue and normal),
Clove,
Jasmine,
Lavender(normal and tall),
Petunia,
Lily

Textures by [Bee Beeatrice](https://www.curseforge.com/members/bee_beeatrice/projects)

Materiality is too on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/materiality)


Join in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2CyTB3a7F6)!

Pls add a comment and tell me if you find a bug!
